body:
Implement NACK suppression logic. Steps:
1. Update verification-domain-gate.js (or shared message handler) to track NACKs per task_id.
2. Allow only a single NACK per task_id; subsequent NACK attempts must be ignored.
3. When a NACK is issued, schedule automatic archiving of the NACKed message after 24 hours (use existing archive utilities).
4. Ensure the system never issues a NACK in response to a NACK.
5. Add unit tests covering: (a) first NACK accepted, (b) second NACK rejected, (c) auto-archive after 24 h simulation.
6. Log events to cps_log.jsonl.
7. Commit with message "P1: Implement NACK suppression" and push.

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: schema_version; Missing required field: task_id; Missing required field: idempotency_key; Missing required field: subject; Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: execution; Missing required field: lease; Missing required field: retry; Missing required field: evidence; task_kind is required for task/response/escalation/handoff messages
